title: antennaria parlinii subsp. fallax
intro: Antennaria parlinii subsp. fallax is a subspecies of the Antennaria parlinii plant, commonly known as a flowering perennial plant in the sunflower family (Asteraceae). This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional medicine, where it has been used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Antennaria parlinii subsp. fallax include its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can help alleviate respiratory issues, skin irritations, and other infections. Traditionally, the plant has been prepared as an infusion, tincture, or poultice for its medicinal uses, although more research is needed to confirm its effectiveness and safety for widespread use.
